items.title: Fixed mobile subscription payment failures
items.description: Mobile payments now work reliably across all environments
details: Fixed TEST vs LIVE Stripe mode configuration mismatch
Mobile app now correctly uses environment-specific Stripe backend
Eliminated "No such setupintent" errors during payment flow
Added proper Stripe price ID synchronization between mobile and backend
Environment-aware configuration for development and production

items.title: Fixed Stripe price ID mismatches
items.description: Subscription creation now works without price lookup errors
details: Resolved "No such price" errors when subscribing to premium plans
Added proper handling of TEST and LIVE mode price IDs
Database plans now correctly reference environment-specific Stripe prices
Updated plan sync system to validate price IDs against correct Stripe mode
Added debugging tools for Stripe configuration verification

items.title: Enhanced native payment form
items.description: Better reliability and error handling
details: Added stripePriceId parameter support to PaymentSheetForm
Improved payment confirmation flow with better error messages
Enhanced debug logging for payment troubleshooting
Better environment configuration visibility (DEV/PROD mode logging)
Fixed payment intent handling to support both SetupIntent and PaymentIntent

items.title: Improved API configuration system
items.description: Better environment handling
details: Enhanced ApiConfig to support multiple deployment environments
Added environment-specific webhook URL configuration
Better separation between TEST and LIVE mode settings
Improved configuration debugging and validation tools

items.title: Enhanced Stripe mode detection
items.description: Automatic environment detection
details: Better handling of TEST vs LIVE Stripe keys
Improved price ID validation across different modes
Added configuration checks for mobile payment setup
Enhanced error messages for configuration issues
Better logging of Stripe environment state

items.title: Added comprehensive debugging scripts
items.description: 9 new tools for easier troubleshooting
details: check-api-config.js - Verify API endpoint configuration
check-live-prices.js - Check LIVE mode Stripe prices
check-stripe-prices.js - Validate Stripe price IDs
debug-mobile-config.js - Debug mobile app configuration
debug-stripe-keys.js - Verify Stripe key setup
test-payment-endpoint.js - Test payment endpoint connectivity
test-payment-flow.js - End-to-end payment flow testing
test-sync-endpoint.js - Validate subscription sync
verify-stripe-price.js - Verify price ID exists in Stripe

items.title: Created detailed troubleshooting guides
items.description: Easy reference for common issues
details: MOBILE_APP_CONFIG_FIX.md - Guide for mobile app configuration issues
STRIPE_PRICE_MISMATCH_FIX.md - Step-by-step guide for price ID issues
Comprehensive explanation of TEST vs LIVE mode differences
Quick fix commands for common configuration problems
Environment setup best practices

sections.title: Note Sharing - Now a Core Feature

items.title: Removed note sharing feature flag
items.description: Note sharing is now a core feature available to all users
details: Eliminated artificial limitations on note sharing functionality
Removed usage limits (previously 5 shares/month for free users)
Note sharing is now unlimited for all users regardless of subscription
Simplified feature management by removing flag dependencies
Updated all related services, limits, and admin tools

items.title: Added comprehensive error boundaries
items.description: App no longer crashes on errors
details: Created robust ErrorBoundary component with graceful error handling
Wrapped main app layouts (web and native) with error protection
Users see friendly "Try Again" screen instead of crashes
Debug information available in development mode
Automatic error recovery and retry mechanisms

items.title: Fixed app crash on kill/restart
items.description: App now handles killed state gracefully
details: Improved session restoration with timeout protection (20s timeout)
Added race condition prevention for app state transitions
Enhanced mobile app state handling with better delays (1-2s)
Safe session restoration that won't crash the app
Graceful fallback to minimal profiles when database queries timeout

items.title: Enhanced crash recovery mechanisms
items.description: Automatic recovery from edge cases
details: Added 18-second crash recovery timeout in useAuth hook
Session restoration coordination to prevent premature navigation
Better loading states with "Restoring your session..." message
Extended timeouts to allow proper session restoration
Prevents navigation before session restoration completes

items.title: Improved session restoration robustness
items.description: Better handling of slow networks
details: Reduced profile verification timeout from 3s to 2s for faster failure detection
Added minimal profile creation as fallback when database queries timeout
Better error handling throughout session restoration process
Non-blocking initialization prevents app startup delays
Silent timeout handling without showing errors to users

items.title: Enhanced app state handling
items.description: Better background/foreground transitions
details: Prevented multiple simultaneous restoration attempts
Added individual timeouts for each session attempt (5s per attempt)
Improved validation of current user sessions
Better cleanup of stale user data on errors
Network resilience for slow connections

items.title: Fixed note sharing URLs
items.description: Now uses correct domain instead of placeholder
details: Changed from 'your-app-url.com/shared/' to 'wiznote.app/shared/'
Updated PaymentForm fallback URLs to use actual domain
Fixed support ticket URLs in database triggers
Added environment variable support for easy configuration
Consistent domain usage across all sharing features

items.title: Fixed session restoration timeout errors
items.description: No more "Session restoration timeout" errors
details: Graceful handling of timeout errors without showing to users
Better logging with appropriate log levels (warn vs error)
Automatic retry mechanisms for failed restorations
Fallback strategies when session restoration fails

items.title: Fixed race condition in navigation
items.description: App no longer navigates before session restoration
details: Added session restoration completion tracking
Navigation only happens after restoration is complete
Prevents users from being sent to login screen when they have valid sessions
Better coordination between auth state and navigation logic

items.title: Fixed app state transition crashes
items.description: Better handling of killed/restart scenarios
details: Improved AppState change handling with proper delays
Better error handling in mobile app state transitions
Prevented crashes when app is killed and restarted
Enhanced session validation on app activation

items.title: Fixed keyboard blocking share sheet on mobile
items.description: Share sheet now properly avoids keyboard
details: Upgraded to @gorhom/bottom-sheet v5 for professional bottom sheet implementation
Share sheet now smoothly moves up when keyboard appears
Interactive keyboard behavior with keyboardBehavior="interactive"
Users can now access all share options without keyboard obstruction

items.title: Upgraded create note bottom sheet
items.description: Create note options now use professional bottom sheet
details: Dynamic snap points that adjust based on available options
Swipe-down to close gesture for better UX
Backdrop tap-to-close functionality
Consistent bottom sheet experience across all modals

items.title: Fixed mobile quiz header padding
items.description: Quiz screens now have proper status bar spacing
details: Updated quiz header padding: 20px → 48px
Prevents close/back buttons from being hidden by status bar

items.title: Fixed shared note loading
items.description: Shared notes now load properly without freezing
details: Removed blocking condition that waited for user's notes to load first
Added proper authentication state check with authLoading flag
Unauthenticated users now get proper login prompt
Authenticated users can now successfully access shared notes

items.title: Protected viewers from AI usage counting
items.description: Viewing shared notes doesn't drain AI quota
details: AI summaries won't auto-generate when viewing shared notes
Manual AI generation blocked for shared notes
Only displays existing AI features generated by note owner

items.title: Fixed account deletion modal
items.description: Delete account modal now properly displays password fields
details: Removed blocking test element that was covering form content
Fixed ScrollView configuration for accessibility
Updated modal height for optimal user experience

items.title: Fixed email verification
items.description: Email verification links now work properly
details: Added missing auth/callback route registration
Users can complete email verification without errors

items.title: Added Terms of Service links
items.description: Users can now easily access terms and privacy policy
details: Added links to login and signup screens
Both links properly styled and functional on all platforms
